Grounding falsified naive guesses against the publisher (ultimate-risk is published as 'Guarantor basis' CBS_BASIS=U, not 'UR'; key 5A/position-S corrected); integrity critic BLOCKED an ungrounded L_MEASURE=S code in the headline observation, fixed by adding the CL_STOCK_FLOW excerpt (S = Amounts outstanding/Stocks). Determination: CBS-UR NARROWS but does NOT CLOSE the DP2 China HOLE (bank-claims leg only; non-bank securities/Treasury leg and offshore-SPV issuer-nationality remain uncovered). REOPENED AGAIN for imf_cpis: the DP2 audit (build/audit/cpis_probe.json) proved CPIS bilateral was OBTAINABLE — DP2's HOLE was a US-vs-ISO3-USA query bug, not absent data. CPIS RESTORES the bilateral structure F3/F4 need but is RESIDENCY-based and does NOT close the offshore-SPV issuer-nationality gap (distinct, carried-forward hole). Grounded against FRED SWPT / Fed H.4.1 (data-source-agent, fetched 2026-06-29): weekly, Millions USD, system-AGGREGATE series, coverage 2002-12-18..2026-06-24 (1228 wk rows, persisted build/data/fed_swaps/SWPT_2002_2026.csv) spanning 2008 and 2020; peaks 583,135mn (2008-12-17, series max) and 448,946mn (2020-05-27) recomputed from the CSV (AGREE with Test C, not copied); current ~$35mn (2026-06-24) -> STRESS-STATE dimension only, does NOT distort the 2025 matrix LEVEL. Part 0 (build/contracts/nport_gcap_contract.json, data-source-agent, fetched 2026-06-29 from SEC primary + GCAP repos): DETERMINATION = RESIDUAL HOLE, premise NOT overturned. N-PORT IS publicly constructible on a RESIDENCE basis (item C.5.a = 'country where the issuer is organized'; quarterly third-month-of-fiscal-quarter only per SEC PR 2019-23; 2019Q4-present; security-level ISIN/CUSIP) -- this relaxes part of the premise -- BUT the NATIONALITY (haven->China ultimate-parent) reattribution is a COMMERCIALLY-GATED HOLE: the GCAP/CMNS crosswalk code is public but its inputs require 7 licensed non-redistributed databases (CGS, Dealogic, SDC, Capital IQ, ORBIS, FactSet, Morningstar + OpenFIGI key). Part 1 (build/data/nport/us_china_panel_provenance.json + build_us_china_panel.py; matrix-assembly-agent): built the residence-resolved panel that CAN be built -- 1,141,109 security-level rows across a DOCUMENTED 8-fiscal-quarter SUBSET (2019q3,q4; 2020q1-q3; 2022q1,q2; 2024q4; NOT the full 21-quarter range, skips stated), 41,067 accession numbers (3 spot-checked live vs EDGAR, one confirmed NPORT-P), 1,470 funds; identifier coverage 99.33% MEASURED (>95%); issuer_nationality = 'UNDETERMINED-NO-PUBLIC-CROSSWALK' on EVERY row (NOT fabricated; Alibaba sits at residence KY with China-parent UNDETERMINED). US-registered-fund holders only (the operator's dense US-holder leg). The 38MB parquet is gitignored (reproducible via the build script + SEC ZIP URLs); per-quarter aggregates persisted in build/results/dp1reopen_p2p3_verify.json. Pinned f[0.49,0.71] can be NEITHER confirmed NOR refuted from public N-PORT. The STILL-GEOMETRIC-ONLY / UNIDENTIFIABLE-FROM-AVAILABLE-DATA standing is unchanged. || FREE-MAP COVERAGE MEASUREMENT (2026-06-30, gates whether a free per-security nationality re-tag is worth attempting; symmetric — does NOT re-tag operator, re-run separability, or touch DP2-DP6): Assembled FREE per-security ultimate-parent sources — (a) GLEIF Level-2 RR golden copy (real bulk file, 477,383 relationships, publish 2026-06-29 16:00 UTC) + free GLEIF API for parent legal country (field entity.legalAddress.country), built issuer_lei->parent_country for 3,427 of 3,434 distinct non-null haven issuer_leis; (b) a filing-sourced hand-map of 9 SEC 20-F Chinese VIE/ADR issuers (Alibaba/Baidu/JD/NetEase/PDD/TAL/Trip.com/ZTO/HWorld), 70 ISIN rows, each sourced to an EDGAR CIK+20-F. MEASURED coverage on the haven subset (CYM/HKG/VGB) of build/data/nport/us_china_nationality_panel.parquet, USD-equivalent (currency_value is mixed HKD/USD, converted; B FX-invariant): A coverage-any-nationality = 0.686 by value (pooled), but 58.1% of A is COSMETIC (GLEIF SELF restating residence); B nationality!=residence (the DISCRIMINATING share that can break the uniform aggregate reweighting) = 0.287 pooled (0.184-0.360, falling over time); C CN-parent share of total haven value = 0.226 pooled (real, non-trivial). Uncovered tail = 0.314 of haven value, almost entirely Cayman (KY=0.300), DIFFUSE (issuer HHI 0.0014, top-10=6.7%); top untagged are Cayman CLO/structured-credit + hedge-fund vehicles (Madison Park, Palmer Square, Carlyle, Dryden, Voya CLO...), NOT Chinese operating companies; no large obvious-CN parent (Tencent/Meituan/Xiaomi) sits unflagged at the top of the tail (those are HKEX, not SEC, so unsourceable under the do-not-guess rule; ANT International ~0.15% disclosed, immaterial). PRE-REGISTERED RULE applied to B: B=0.287 << 0.80 AND tail large/Cayman-heavy/diffuse => RECOMMEND-NOT-PROCEED: a free-map re-tag would leave ~31% diffuse Cayman value to a RAS/max-entropy fill that would DOMINATE and collapse back to the ~+0.521 aggregate result; the licensed CMNS crosswalk remains the only thing that closes identification. Symmetric: had B>~0.80 with a bound-able tail the same script returns PROCEED. Reproducibility: build/audit/freemap_coverage_recompute.py regenerates every number from panel+2 lookups (no network); orchestrator EXECUTED it -> byte-identical to build/audit/freemap_coverage.json (verifier build/results/freemap_coverage_verify.json). Confirmed investment_country is ISO alpha-2 (HK/KY/VG) so B is not inflated by a residence-encoding mismatch. Integrity-critic GATE = PASS (GLEIF really fetched, every hand-map row sourced, coverage recomputed not asserted, symmetric-error clean both directions, NOT-PROCEED earned not planted); two read-only-unverifiable items (recompute reproducibility; alpha-2 encoding) CLOSED by orchestrator execution above. DP2-DP5 untouched, DP6 NOT begun. || CONSTRUCT-THE-CROSSWALK COVERAGE BUILD (2026-06-30; gates whether a FREE per-security re-tag is worth running, by CONSTRUCTING the crosswalk the prior GLEIF-only pass lacked; does NOT re-tag operator, re-run separability, or touch DP2-DP6): Pre-registration committed FIRST (git 4efb52d): expected B toward ~0.45-0.65, materially above 0.287, not clearing 0.80. Built a free official crosswalk: R1 SEC-HFCAA Commission-Identified-Issuer list (174 CIIs; 148 matched to panel after fix), R2 EDGAR VIE-look-through Inline-XBRL OpCo-jurisdiction=CN (read from real 20-Fs, e.g. Alibaba acc 0001193125-26-231755 EntityIncorporation=Cayman + VIE-in-PRC), R3 Form F-6/20-F home-jurisdiction=CN, R4 GLEIF-QCC CN country-segment; glued to panel via GLEIF ISIN->LEI (12.1% by count, 41.5% by value) + QCC/OpenCorporates. Every CN tag traces to a rule; none name-guessed. Applied to the haven panel -> build/data/nport/panel_crosswalk_tagged.parquet (value reconciles to panel haven exactly; per-rule R1 56,041rows/19.3%, R2 12,861/10.3%, R3 9,347/8.8%, R4 8,805/3.3%; CN-tagged union 64,057rows/$761B/22.2%). RE-MEASURED coverage (build/audit/crosswalk_coverage.json; same statistic as the prior freemap pass; orchestrator-executed recompute byte-identical): B (nationality!=residence, decision number) = 0.3425 vs prior 0.287 = +0.0554 UP; A_union=0.690; C CN-share=0.278 USD-equiv/0.222 raw; uncovered tail 0.310, KY-dominated (0.296), diffuse (HHI 0.0014, top-10 6.8%). LEAK FIX (load-bearing): the first run left NetEase (HFCAA-listed, ~$33B) untagged via an undecoded HTML ' ' entity in the HFCAA conclusive-list names; fixing the html.unescape + re-deriving the HFCAA CIK->security map from real SEC files recovered NetEase/ZTO/VNET/MINISO/Youdao/Chindata/China-Southern-Air (matches 134->148, B 0.324->0.3425). Post-fix top-20 tail carries no genuinely-untagged obvious-CN name (the lone flag 'Dryden Senior Loan Fund' is the se-NIO-r substring false positive; NIO itself is tagged). ANT International ($2.9B) documented as a GENUINE free-route residual (not an HFCAA CII -- IPO pulled; QCC=HK; GLEIF SELF->HK). Tencent/Meituan/Xiaomi are HKEX-not-SEC, genuinely unreachable by the free route. DECISION (pre-registered rule on B): B=0.3425 << 0.80 with a large/diffuse/Cayman tail -> RECOMMEND-NOT-PROCEED. The free SEC/XBRL route adds REAL per-security CN nationality (now tags every SEC-listed Chinese VIE/ADR incl. NetEase) but ~31% of haven value -- diffuse non-Chinese Cayman structured credit -- has no non-residence nationality; the licensed CMNS crosswalk remains the only closer for the residual. PREDICTION: PARTIALLY REFUTED -- directional claim held (B rose materially above 0.287) but the 0.45-0.65 magnitude was REFUTED on the LOW side (B reached only 0.34; the free route added less than predicted, because the prior GLEIF+handmap had already captured most large-name value and the haven pool is non-China-Cayman-dominated). Reported as found, not tuned. Integrity-critic GATE = PASS (pre-registration genuine; HFCAA/XBRL/F-6/GLEIF/QCC really fetched; every CN flag rule-traceable, alias excludes reverse-merger drift; NetEase leak found+fixed, no obvious-CN left untagged; B recomputed, value reconciles; recommendation honest re the low-side miss). Two read-only items (git ordering; recompute execution) CLOSED by orchestrator execution. Standing UNIDENTIFIABLE-FROM-AVAILABLE-DATA verdict unchanged. DP2-DP5 untouched, DP6 NOT begun.

RE-RUN (supersedes prior DP2) on the CPIS-augmented matrix. 873 OBSERVED cells (Fed EFA 585, TIC 36+residual, BIS LBS 76, COFER 9, + 167 CPIS bilateral portfolio cells; 0 ESTIMATED) — delta +167 vs prior 706 (prior had CPIS as a HOLE on a query bug). Audit corrections applied and integrity-critic VERIFIED (PASS): (1) claims/liabilities label swap fixed and checked against BIS source (C=claims $9.53tn, L=liabilities $10.24tn, hand-summed); (2) residual now REPRODUCIBLE — build/model/ras_inputs.json persists row/col targets + seed; build/results/dp2_recompute_check.py regenerates it from disk alone (passed=true); (3) NO assumed collapse — CPIS block is a labeled CONSISTENCY pass (no independent portfolio marginal on disk), and the binding residual is the irreducible ~$711.16bn BIS claims/liabilities marginal floor, untouched by CPIS. Offshore-hub cells (US->CYM $2.8tn etc.) kept basis=residency, NOT reallocated; offshore-SPV issuer-nationality fraction a bounded cell-level HOLE in 3 artifacts. Largest residual = the $711bn BIS floor.

SPECIFICATION ONLY (no parameter fit; estimation is DP4, not begun). Four factors mapped to OBSERVED matrix quantities: F1 (BIS USD marginals + Fed S2), F2 (TIC/Fed S4, QUANTITY-only; convenience-yield a HOLE, not proxied), F3 (CPIS issuer shares across CYM/HKG/VGB/CHN), F4 (USA issuer column across 12 holders). F3/F4 separating restriction R_sep stated with economic content, identifying matrix variation, a FALSIFIER (if destinations are offshore-USD ABS via Cayman SPVs, F4 also moves them -> F3/F4 observationally equivalent), and falsifier-case status checked against the matrix: PARTIALLY obtains (destination cells now dense -> testable-IN-PRINCIPLE, an advance vs the old NOT-TESTABLE; but nationality is a HOLE and there is one period). STEP-0 grounded interval [0,0.60] (NBER WP 30865). STEP-3 sensitivity = FORM (b): identification FLIPS across the interval; the China-nationality fraction is LOAD-BEARING. Fails at f=0 (F3=F4 observationally); only conditionally identified toward 0.60 (second HOLE: offshore-USD ABS share); no f* invented, no distribution assigned. OPERATIVE VERDICT for DP5: F3/F4 separation NOT ESTABLISHED (depends on data we do not have); the f->0.60 branch must NOT be read as identification. Integrity-critic PASS on all 6 gate checks; routed R_sep's economic validity (a hypothesis, not verified) to the human gate. Carried forward unresolved: offshore issuer-nationality HOLE, $711bn BIS floor, F2 price leg. DP4 not begun. REOPENED (official-sector, F4 ONLY) per Resolution Test C: structural-model-agent added the official_sector_respec sub-object to F4_dollar_run (respec_id F4-OFFICIAL-BACKSTOP). v_F4 re-specified as TWO opposite-sign components: the existing run-DRAIN (negative on the 12 CPIS USA-column holder cells) PLUS a new official backstop-INJECTION (positive on the SWPT/H.4.1 official-provision cell). Backstop is a GENUINE STATE-DEPENDENT component (~0 calm at $35mn / ~$0.5tn under stress at the 2008/2020 values), NOT a cosmetic constant; enters global-games selection as a circuit-breaker raising theta* (run feasible only at worse fundamentals), consistent with the existing equilibrium_concept. FALSIFIER: backstop PRESENT-but-insufficient (large positive injection cell, run still reaches frontier) vs ABSENT (injection ~0, run proceeds) -- distinct operator signatures. Estimability HONESTLY BOUNDED: only 2008+2020 backstop-active episodes + single snapshot -> may NOT be separately estimable; non-identification reserved to DP5 as a permitted outcome (NOT claimed identified -- specification only, no fit, DP4/DP5 out of scope). SOURCE on every atomic claim (fed_swap_lines.json + Test C). EXPLICITLY does NOT touch f / F3-F4 separability: R_sep, R2, F3, equilibrium_concept, china_fraction_bound [0,0.60] all UNMODIFIED (verified to retain 2026-06-28 content); the f / empirical-separability question remains OPEN (OPEN-PENDING-DATA per build/audit/consolidated_verdict.md). Integrity-critic GATE: PASS (backstop genuine not cosmetic CONFIRMED; f untouched CONFIRMED by name; falsifier real; no detectable planting). NON-BLOCKING to human gate: the economic sign of the theta*-raising claim (stated falsifiably, cannot be certified correct). DP6 NOT begun.

ESTIMATION under the DP3 form-(b) verdict (NOT re-opened/softened/overturned). Built the identification operator M=[v_F3|v_F4] (15x2) from real matrix cells; computed the SINGULAR SPECTRUM across the (f, USD-share) plane. NUMERICAL confirmation of DP3's analytic degeneracy: at f=0 the separating term f*DESTn vanishes -> operator rank 1 -> smallest singular value (separation margin) = 0.0; collapsing right-singular vector = (-0.707,+0.707) = the F3-minus-F4 difference is unresolved. Margin SURFACE: ->0 along the ENTIRE f=0 edge for all USD-share; monotone up in f, down in USD-share (even f=0.60 dragged 0.378->0.284 by the confound). HAZARD = a CONDITIONAL SURFACE over the two holes, NOT a point (a point hazard refused as a stage failure); infimum of the margin over the admissible plane = 0 -> binding-mode NOWHERE robustly identified. 2022 episode reported F-CONTINGENT (loads as F4 at the f=0 endpoint), NOT revived as F3. Single-snapshot contagion-vs-substitution discriminator marked UNESTIMABLE, not proxied. REPRODUCIBLE: build/results/dp4_recompute_check.py regenerates the spectrum from dp4_inputs.json ALONE (passed=true, max dev 5.6e-17). Integrity-critic PASS on all 6 gate checks; routed to human gate: the shared-USA-block assumption (makes f=0 margin exactly 0 - faithful to DP3 step2 but a judgment) and the tau=0.10 threshold. RESULTS STAMPED OUTPUT - NOT ESTABLISHED until the DP5 verifier (build/results/dp5_idtest.json) exists. Carried forward: both holes (f, offshore-USD share), $711bn BIS floor, single-snapshot limit. VERIFIER NOW EXISTS (DP5 dp5_idtest.json ran): DP4's spectrum is ESTABLISHED, and the established result is NON-IDENTIFICATION of F3/F4 (the rank-1 degeneracy at f=0 is confirmed, not overturned).

IDENTIFICATION GATE (terminal stage; the ★ human gate = this PR on web). FINAL VERDICT: F3/F4 separation NOT IDENTIFIED -- HOLDS. Part 1 episode-sort (no pre-assignment): 2022 Russia-sanctions = UNDECIDABLE/F4-at-endpoint NOT F3; 2008 GFC & 2020 COVID = UNDECIDABLE; 2011-13 debt-ceiling = F2-flavoured/thin.
